summary: Completed comprehensive testing of authentication system and UI updates. All major features implemented successfully including Google OAuth integration, request access workflow, lavender circle behind logo, royal blue accents, and navigation changes.

design_issues.issue: Login page title not clearly visible (minor issue - functionality works)

Homepage loads with lavender circle behind logo
Navigation shows 'Client Portal' link instead of direct AurorAI/CompassAI links

Login page loads with Google sign-in button
Services page loads and works properly
Governance Maturity Indicator properly removed from homepage
Royal blue accents and gradient buttons implemented
